caption: 3 Days at the most beautiful hotel in Vietnam 🇻🇳 I came here to see a room, And I left remembering what it feels like to stop thinking…. Every corner. Every angle. Every moment of light. @lafestaphuquoc - a curio collection by Hilton, didn’t just give me a view, They gave me permission to disappear into fantasy 🫶🏻 #phuquoc #vietnam #luxuryhotels #lafesta #hilton Luxury hotels in Sunset town, Phu Quoc, Vietnam 🇻🇳
